title: SuitBags for Men 120 x 60 CM, Dust-Proof Garment Bags, Non-woven Fabric Suit Bag, Prevent Moths Suit Cover with Zip, Clothes Covers for Suits, Dress, Coat, Jacket (120CM / 47IN - 1PCS)
features: 【Breathable Fabric】- The suit covers for men is made of high quality non-woven fabric, light and breathable, soft and comfortable to the touch, both waterproof and moisture-proof properties, durable and ideal for clothing protection

【Unique Design】- The top of the suit bags are equipped with a PVC diaphragm, which can effectively block dust; the transparent window with card holder design allows you to quickly find the clothes you need without guessing. The metal hanger holes at the bottom can help hanging, making the journey more relaxing and enjoyable

【Easy To Use】- The zip is carefully designed and reinforced for smooth sliding and easy operation. The foldable feature makes the suit covers easy to store and save space when idle, whether it's for home organisation or travelling, it's an excellent and powerful assistant

【Comprehensive Protection】- The clothes covers protector bags can effectively insulate dust, mould and pet hair, keeping clothes tidy and reducing wrinkles. Simply hang it without folding to free up more space in your wardrobe

【Widely Applicable】- The size of this suit bags for women is 120*60CM / 47*23.6IN, perfect for all kinds of clothes up to 120cm in length, whether it's suits, dresses or other clothing, it can be easily stored, say goodbye to the cluttered wardrobe, and enjoy a neat and orderly living space
